Best Tools to Learn Tool  Why PlatformIO (VS Code)  Better than Arduino IDE for ESP32 esp32-camera library  Official Espressif camera driver ArduinoJson  Parse sensor JSON easily MicroPython (optional)  Easier prototyping than C++ MQTT (later)  Better than HTTP for sensor streams Ollama + LLaVA  Local vision AI (no cloud needed) Best Learning Resources Resource  What It Covers DroneBot Workshop (YouTube)  ESP32 from zero to robot GreatScott! (YouTube)  Electronics + fun projects Magesh (YouTube)  ESP32-CAM specific projects Espressif ADF docs  Official audio dev framework Random Nerd Tutorials  Best ESP32 sensor guides PlatformIO docs  Embedded development workflow Suggested Build Order Week 1: Program ESP32-CAM → Flash LED → Stream camera to browser Week 2: Wire motors → ESP32 controls movement Week 3: Add sensors → ESP32 reads + prints environment Week 4: WiFi bridge → Python on PC receives stream Week 5: Voice + Ollama → Lina speaks AND sees Week 6+: Assemble body → Put it all together

reacted to: "Dear Participant, Greetings from East West University Robotics Club. We regret to inform you that we have to reschedule our EWU National RoboFest 2026 to a later date after the Eid vacation due to some internal scheduling circumstances. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience and understanding regarding this matter.  We will update the new schedule and inform you of the new dates as soon as possible through our official Page and email. Thank you for staying with us and supporting EWU National RoboFest 2026. We are committed to making this event a memorable experience for all participants. Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. Best Regards, EWUNRF26 Organizing Committee"
